text:
was the name given by Hange Zoë to a Titan which was captured during the reconquest of Trost District.

Appearance

Pure Titan

Beane was a Titan that stood 7 meters high and had short messy brown hair and brown eyes. Beane also had light peachy-colored skin like the other normal Titans.

Abilities

Beane displayed typical traits for a Titan of its class. It acted with little intelligence, and responded to an attempt of communication by attempting to eat Hange. It appeared to have a sense of pain, since it reacted when its eye was gouged out by a spear. It exhibited a loss of activity after three hours of sunlight deprivation.

Story

The 57th Exterior Scouting Mission arc

Beane presumably first appears when the gate of Trost District is broken by the Colossal Titan and numerous Titans invade the walls. However, once the breach is plugged by Eren Jaeger, human forces are able to retake the district. Most of the Titans who had entered are killed, but two are taken alive; Hange Zoë nicknames them "Sawney" and "Beane." A number of experiments are performed on them, testing their response to attempts at communication, injury, and sunlight deprivation. Hange has further tests planned; however, during the night, both Beane and Sawney are killed by an unknown assailant. Officers conduct an investigation, checking soldiers' ODM gear for recent use. Armin Arlelt later comes to the conclusion that it was the doing of Annie Leonhart, since she had given Marco Bodt's ODM gear to be inspected instead of her own. Armin's discovery leads to the unmasking of Annie as the Female Titan.

People killed

Failed attempts

Hange Zoë

Trivia

Hange's nicknames for the two Titans, Sawney and Beane, are direct references to the infamous cannibal of the same name, .
The names that Hange gave to the two Titans that the Scout Regiment captured before Sawney and Beane, which were Chikatilo and Albert, perhaps refer to the Soviet serial killer Andrei Chikatilo and the American serial killer and cannibal Albert Fish.
Beane and Flegel Reeves share the same English voice actor.
